message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>This paper stresses its base contribution on a new SIR-type model for COVID-19 including direct and fomite transmission as well as the effect of distinct household structures. To what extent increasing the physical-distancing-related contact radius and enhancing mass control (public curfew, lockdown, workplace clearance, and school closure) reduce the number of predicted active cases is studied via parameter estimation.</jats:p>
title: A COVID-19 epidemic model integrating direct and fomite transmission as well as household structure
